title: campanula rotundifolia subsp. catalanica
intro: Campanula rotundifolia subsp. catalanica, also known as Bluebell of Catalonia, is a subspecies of the Bellflower plant, belonging to the Campanulaceae family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is said to have health benefits such as soothing digestive issues, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory problems. Traditionally, it has been used to prepare herbal remedies, including infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various ailments.
